patterns.name: daily-triage
patterns.description: Report-only daily project triage loop for risks, stale work, open decisions, and next suggested actions.

patterns.name: release-readiness
patterns.description: Report-only release readiness loop for version, changelog, quality gates, drift, and human release decisions.

patterns.name: layer-update-watch
patterns.description: Report-only loop for comparing installed target projects against the current lizard-agent-layer version and producing update plans.
